cancelled.descriptionHtml: A secret scanning alert dismissal request was canceled.
cancelled.summaryHtml:
This event occurs when there is activity related to a user's request to dismiss a secret scanning alert.

To subscribe to this event, a GitHub App must have at least read-level access for the "Secret scanning alerts" repository permission.

[!NOTE] Delegated alert dismissal for secret scanning is currently in public preview and subject to change.

bodyParameters.name: enterprise
bodyParameters.description: An enterprise on GitHub. Webhook payloads contain the enterprise property when the webhook is configured on an enterprise account or an organization that's part of an enterprise account. For more information, see "About enterprise accounts."

bodyParameters.name: installation
bodyParameters.description: The GitHub App installation. Webhook payloads contain the installation property when the event is configured for and sent to a GitHub App. For more information, see "Using webhooks with GitHub Apps."

bodyParameters.name: organization
bodyParameters.description: A GitHub organization. Webhook payloads contain the organization property when the webhook is configured for an organization, or when the event occurs from activity in a repository owned by an organization.

bodyParameters.name: repository
bodyParameters.description: The repository on GitHub where the event occurred. Webhook payloads contain the repository property when the event occurs from activity in a repository.

bodyParameters.name: exemption_request
bodyParameters.description: A request from a user to be exempted from a set of rules.

childParamsGroups.name: id
childParamsGroups.description: The ID of the exemption request.

childParamsGroups.name: number
childParamsGroups.description: The number uniquely identifying the exemption request within it's repository.

childParamsGroups.name: repository_id
childParamsGroups.description: The ID of the repository the exemption request is for.

childParamsGroups.name: requester_id
childParamsGroups.description: The ID of the user who requested the exemption.

childParamsGroups.name: requester_login
childParamsGroups.description: The login of the user who requested the exemption.

childParamsGroups.name: request_type
childParamsGroups.description: The type of request.

childParamsGroups.name: Push ruleset bypass exemption request data
childParamsGroups.description: Push rules that are being requested to be bypassed.

childParamsGroups.name: type
childParamsGroups.description: The type of request

childParamsGroups.name: data
childParamsGroups.description: The data pertaining to the push rules that are being requested to be bypassed.

childParamsGroups.name: ruleset_id
childParamsGroups.description: The ID of the ruleset for the rules that were violated

childParamsGroups.name: ruleset_name
childParamsGroups.description: The name of the ruleset for the rules that were violated

childParamsGroups.name: total_violations
childParamsGroups.description: The number of violations

childParamsGroups.name: rule_type
childParamsGroups.description: The type of rule that was violated

childParamsGroups.name: Secret scanning push protection exemption request data
childParamsGroups.description: Secret scanning push protections that are being requested to be bypassed.

childParamsGroups.name: type
childParamsGroups.description: The type of request

childParamsGroups.name: data
childParamsGroups.description: The data pertaining to the secret scanning push protections that are being requested to be bypassed.

childParamsGroups.name: secret_type
childParamsGroups.description: The type of secret that was detected

childParamsGroups.name: locations
childParamsGroups.description: The location data of the secret that was detected

childParamsGroups.name: commit
childParamsGroups.description: The commit SHA where the secret was detected

childParamsGroups.name: branch
childParamsGroups.description: The branch where the secret was detected

childParamsGroups.name: path
childParamsGroups.description: The path of the file where the secret was detected

childParamsGroups.name: Secret scanning alert dismissal request data
childParamsGroups.description: Secret scanning alerts that have dismissal requests.

childParamsGroups.name: type
childParamsGroups.description: The type of request

childParamsGroups.name: data
childParamsGroups.description: The data related to the secret scanning alerts that have dismissal requests.

childParamsGroups.name: reason
childParamsGroups.description: The reason for the dismissal request

childParamsGroups.name: secret_type
childParamsGroups.description: The type of secret that was detected

childParamsGroups.name: alert_number
childParamsGroups.description: The number of the alert that was detected

childParamsGroups.name: Code scanning alert dismissal request data
childParamsGroups.description: Code scanning alerts that have dismissal requests.

childParamsGroups.name: type
childParamsGroups.description: The type of request

childParamsGroups.name: data
childParamsGroups.description: The data related to the code scanning alerts that have dismissal requests.

childParamsGroups.name: alert_number

childParamsGroups.name: Dependabot alert dismissal request data
childParamsGroups.description: Dependabot alerts that have dismissal requests.

childParamsGroups.name: type
childParamsGroups.description: The type of request

childParamsGroups.name: data
childParamsGroups.description: The data related to the Dependabot alerts that have dismissal requests.

childParamsGroups.name: alert_number

childParamsGroups.name: License compliance alert closure request data
childParamsGroups.description: License compliance alerts that have closure requests.

childParamsGroups.name: type
childParamsGroups.description: The type of request

childParamsGroups.name: data
childParamsGroups.description: The data related to the License compliance alerts that have closure requests.

childParamsGroups.name: alert_number
childParamsGroups.description: The number of the alert to be closed

childParamsGroups.name: resource_identifier
childParamsGroups.description: The unique identifier for the request type of the exemption request. For example, a commit SHA.

childParamsGroups.name: status
childParamsGroups.description: The status of the exemption request.

childParamsGroups.name: requester_comment
childParamsGroups.description: The comment the requester provided when creating the exemption request.

childParamsGroups.name: metadata
childParamsGroups.description: Metadata about the exemption request.

childParamsGroups.name: expires_at
childParamsGroups.description: The date and time the exemption request will expire.

childParamsGroups.name: created_at
childParamsGroups.description: The date and time the exemption request was created.

childParamsGroups.name: responses
childParamsGroups.description: The responses to the exemption request.

childParamsGroups.name: id
childParamsGroups.description: The ID of the exemption response.

childParamsGroups.name: reviewer_id
childParamsGroups.description: The ID of the user who reviewed the exemption request.

childParamsGroups.name: reviewer_login
childParamsGroups.description: The login of the user who reviewed the exemption request.

childParamsGroups.name: status
childParamsGroups.description: The status of the exemption response.

childParamsGroups.name: reviewer_comment
childParamsGroups.description: The comment the reviewer provided when responding to the exemption request.

childParamsGroups.name: created_at
childParamsGroups.description: The date and time the exemption request was created.

childParamsGroups.name: html_url
childParamsGroups.description: The URL to view the exemption request in a browser.

bodyParameters.name: sender
bodyParameters.description: A GitHub user.
